payload.harness_friction: The root Harness database contained Symphony-owned stories, so the supported isolated refactor-plan database was used. The first premerge run exposed a brittle Phase 3 verifier that treated every later append-only changeset as a protected Phase 3 mutation; it was narrowed to exact approved later-phase paths.
